title: Reverse Disintegration Product Ad AI
sourceTitle: Reverse Disintegration Product Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-concept cinematic product advertising image for modular luxury smartwatch with titanium case and sapphire display, showing AURAX LAB reassembling in midair through a reverse-disintegration effect. Subject: modular luxury smartwatch with titanium case and sapphire display is the hero object, suspended in separated components with floating screws, circuit board layers, glass display plate, strap segments, sensors, and polished metal casing clearly visible as the pieces fly back into perfect alignment. Scene: Dark void studio background with deep negative space, cinematic VFX atmosphere, and scattered product pieces floating at different depths around the hero object. Composition: Fixed centered product-ad composition with mechanical precision, exploded parts arranged in depth layers, the main silhouette readable at the center, and enough empty space for a premium campaign feel. Signature Elements: Preserved reverse disintegration product ad source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Cinematic high-concept product advertising with reverse-disintegration motion, premium VFX realism, technical precision, sharp component detail, polished commercial finish, and dramatic depth. Color Palette: Fixed dark graphite void, metallic product highlights, cool rim-light accents, subtle reflections, and restrained premium contrast. Lighting: Directional cinematic key light, thin rim highlights on each suspended piece, soft volumetric haze, and controlled specular detail on product materials. Camera: Three-quarter studio product view with shallow layered depth, crisp hero focus, and component pieces at staggered foreground and background distances. Typography: REASSEMBLE PRECISION may appear as a small clean premium campaign line in safe negative space; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
